data.title: Keystone Lands Technology-Forward Industry Leaders for its Board of Directors
data.description: Michael D. Penner and Michael Rhodes have joined Keystone, a top global technology advisory firm, bringing strong technology and business transformation skills. Their arrival coincides with Keystone's AI proficiency, presenting significant opportunities. The news was announced on April 28, 2026 in New York.

data.title: CIRM Awards AcuraStem $7.5 Million in Grant Funding to Advance AS-241 Toward a First-in-Human Trial for ALS and FTD
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Pasadena, California, AcuraStem, a biotech company focusing on developing therapies for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) among other neurodegenerative diseases, revealed a significant update. They shared that the California Institute for Regenerative Medicine has taken a crucial step in supporting their research efforts.

data.title: Eightpoint CEO, Deniz Gezgin Accepted into Fast Company Executive Board
data.description: The Fast Company Executive Board is an exclusive group of influential individuals who are driving innovation, technology, and design in the business world. On April 28, 2026, in George Town, Cayman Islands, Deniz Gezgin, the Chief Executive Officer of Eightpoint, a digital product company, announced important developments within the organization.

data.title: AccountTECH Report Delivers Critical Equity-Defense Strategy to Protect Brokerage Valuation
data.description: A recent whitepaper has exposed the negative impacts of relying on spreadsheets for financial operations in multi-entity real estate brokerages. The report highlights that such dependence leads to substantial valuation discounts and heightened deal risk. The study was conducted by AccountTECH, a prominent provider of financial back-office solutions within the real estate sector. This revelation was shared in Boston on April 28, 2026. This finding suggests the importance for real estate brokerages to adopt more advanced financial management tools to avoid these negative consequences.

data.title: Amasian TV Rolls Out to 250,000+ Premium Hotel Rooms Across the U.S.
data.description: A new streaming service has been launched, offering a login-free experience specifically designed for hotel guests. This service is now available at 4- and 5-star hotels in prominent U.S. urban areas. On average, there is a significant increase of 12 times in viewership per room each month. This initiative aims to provide a tailored and amplified viewing experience for guests staying at these upscale hotels.

data.title: ACLS Welcomes Five Scholarly Associations to Its Federation of Member Societies
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in New York, the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS) introduced five new members to its network of professional academic practitioners. The ACLS is renowned for promoting the development and dissemination of knowledge in the humanities and social sciences.

data.title: LeanDNA Named 2026 "Partner in Collaborative Innovation" by Manufacturing Leadership Council
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 28, 2026, LeanDNA earned accolades in the Digital Supply Chain sector for their collaboration with Husky Technologies. The company, renowned for its advanced supply chain execution platform, has been commended for the fourth consecutive year as a 2026 Partner in Collaborative efforts.

data.title: Blykalla Selects Aras to Support Lifecycle Management for Next-Generation Nuclear Reactor Development
data.description: In Andover, Massachusetts, Blykalla has chosen Aras Innovator® to aid in its Small Modular Reactor (SMR) development initiative. The decision underscores Blykalla's commitment to advancing SMR technology.

data.title: Majestic Labs Announces Prometheus: The First AI Server Purpose-Built to Break the Memory Wall
data.description: In an announcement made today, Majestic Labs introduced Prometheus, an AI server developed specifically to address the memory wall challenge. This server marks a significant advancement in AI model deployment by connecting substantially more memory to each processor with unparalleled bandwidth. This innovative design and integrated software stack enable the server to deliver performance comparable to multiple racks in a single, highly efficient unit. The announcement was made by Majestic Labs in San Francisco and Tel Aviv, Israel.

data.title: Veryon Showcases Data-Driven Unified Maintenance Suite at NBAA Maintenance Conference
data.description: At the NBAA Maintenance Conference, Veryon showcased its advanced unified maintenance suite powered by artificial intelligence in San Francisco. The suite utilizes data-driven technology to streamline maintenance processes.

data.title: Identifi Launches AI-Powered Signature Detection for Fast, Accurate Document Review
data.description: A company in Safety Harbor, Florida known as Identifi has recently introduced a new technology utilizing artificial intelligence for signature detection in document review, aiming for swift and precise results. This AI-powered solution is designed to enhance the efficiency of reviewing documents and identifying signatures accurately. The company is based in Safety Harbor, Florida, and this new technology is expected to revolutionize the document review process with its fast and accurate capabilities.
CBS News producer in Tehran: After decades of international sanctions and tensions with the West, Iran has become accustomed to difficult economic, social, and political conditions.

data.title: Pro athletes face financial worries post-career despite high earnings. Tennis player Mackenzie McDonald seeks backup plan.
data.description: Mackenzie McDonald, an accomplished tennis player, has accumulated a substantial amount of earnings. However, due to significant expenses and the limited duration of his sports career, he, along with others in similar positions, is exploring alternative options for the future.

data.title: Sunmed™ || Your CBD Store® Applauds President Trump's Endorsement of Full Spectrum CBD and Call to Repeal Restrictive Hemp Bans
data.description: In Palmetto, Florida on April 28, 2026, Sunmed, a leading provider of scientifically proven hemp products, has announced its endorsement of President Donald J. Trump's recent remarks endorsing the ongoing availability of Full Spectrum CBD. The President's declaration signifies a significant move in the support for CBD products, setting the stage for potential growth in the industry.
CBS News producer in Tehran: The country does not appear to be in a state of collapse, by any standards at all.

data.title: Cities of Hidden Hills and Carson Announce Co-Sponsorship of AB 2529 to Increase Accountability in Government Claims Process
data.description: In Hidden Hills and Carson, California, on April 28, 2026, it was reported that there has been a significant increase in questionable monetary claims against public agencies in the state. In response to this issue, the Cities of Hidden Hills and Carson have come together to endorse and back Assembly Bill 2529 (Johnson).

data.title: MedStar Health and Georgetown University Showcase Innovation and Academic Excellence at Annual Research & Education Symposium
data.description: In April 28, 2026, MedStar Health and Georgetown University organized the 2026 MedStar Health–Georgetown University Research & Education Symposium in Washington. The event united a diverse group of medical professionals, including physicians, nurses, researchers, educators, students, and trainees, for collaboration and knowledge sharing. This symposium aimed at fostering innovation and advancing healthcare practices through joint efforts.
